name: @absolutejs/audit-elysia
description: Elysia plugin emitting one structured audit event per request into @absolutejs/audit. Wires into onRequest + onAfterResponse so success AND error paths are captured. Orthogonal to @elysiajs/server-timing (perf headers) and @elysiajs/opentelemetry (sampled tracing); optionally correlates with the active OTel trace id.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/manifest.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external @absolutejs/audit --external @absolutejs/telemetry --external elysia && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && absolute-manifest emit
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run build && bun publish
